                          +[  Handler Group  ]--+
                          |                     |
                          |   +-------------+   |
                          o-->|  Handler 1  |   |
                          |   +-------------+   |
                          |                     |
+------------------+      |   +-------------+   |
|  Request Router  +------o-->|  Handler 2  |   |
+------------------+      |   +-------------+   |
                          |                     |
                          |   +-------------+   |
                          o-->|  Handler 3  |   |
                          |   +-------------+   |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          |                     |
                          +---------------------+
